ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make_model" TEXT /* Make and model of the vehicle */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the vehicle */,
  "price" REAL /* Listing price of the vehicle */,
  "vat_status" TEXT /* VAT status of the vehicle */,
  "km" INTEGER /* Kilometers driven */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., Used) */,
  "warranty" TEXT /* Warranty information */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Fuel type */,
  "comfort_convenience" TEXT /* Comfort and convenience features */,
  "entertainment_media" TEXT /* Entertainment and media features */,
  "extras" TEXT /* Extra features and options */,
  "safety_security" TEXT /* Safety and security features */,
  "gears" TEXT /* Number of gears */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the vehicle */,
  "previous_owners" INTEGER /* Number of previous owners */,
  "hp_kW" INTEGER /* Horsepower in kilowatts */,
  "inspection_new" INTEGER /* New inspection status */,
  "paint_type" TEXT /* Type of paint */,
  "upholstery_type" TEXT /* Type of upholstery */,
  "upholstery_color" TEXT /* Color of upholstery */,
  "nr_of_doors" TEXT /* Number of doors */,
  "nr_of_seats" TEXT /* Number of seats */,
  "gearing_type" TEXT /* Type of gearing */,
  "displacement_cc" INTEGER /* Engine displacement in cubic centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" INTEGER /* Weight in kilograms */,
  "drive_chain" TEXT /* Drive chain type */,
  "cons_comb" REAL /* Combined fuel consumption */,
  "cons_city" REAL /* City fuel consumption */,
  "cons_country" REAL /* Country fuel consumption */,
  "co2_emission" INTEGER /* CO2 emission */,
  "emission_class" TEXT /* Emission class */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "service_history" TEXT /* Summary of service history */,
  "condition_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the vehicle's condition */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency in miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "environmental_rating" TEXT /* Environmental impact rating */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Availability status of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "previous_owner" TEXT /* Name of the previous owner */,
  "ownership_period" TEXT /* Period of ownership */,
  "major_repairs" TEXT /* Major repairs performed */,
  "accident_history" TEXT /* Accident history */,
  "mileage_at_sale" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle at the time of each sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "service_history_details" TEXT /* Detailed service history for each ownership period */,
  "inspection_records" TEXT /* Summary of inspections during the ownership period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_inspection" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of inspection */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection */,
  "inspector_notes" TEXT /* Inspector's notes */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection */,
  "inspection_location" TEXT /* Location where the inspection was conducted */,
  "inspection_cost" REAL /* Cost of the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_inspection_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the vehicle */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "sales_person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "financing_details" TEXT /* Details of any financing arrangements */,
  "warranty_sold" TEXT /* Whether a warranty was sold with the vehicle */,
  "trade_in_vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade-in vehicle (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trade_in_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_in_vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer first interacted with the dealership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image */,
  "image_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_images_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video */,
  "video_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the video */,
  "video_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_videos_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review */,
  "review_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the review source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request */,
  "preferred_test_drive_date" TEXT /* Preferred date for a test drive */,
  "preferred_test_drive_time" TEXT /* Preferred time for a test drive */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or requests from the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_requests_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_requests_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price change */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "vat_status" TEXT /* VAT status */,
  "price_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price change */,
  "price_adjustment" TEXT /* Adjustment to the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_pricing_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_warranties" (
  "warranty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "warranty_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the warranty */,
  "warranty_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the warranty */,
  "warranty_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the warranty */,
  "warranty_coverage" TEXT /* Coverage details */,
  "warranty_cost" REAL /* Cost of the warranty */,
  "warranty_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the warranty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warranty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_warranties_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_category" TEXT /* Category of the feature */,
  "feature_status" TEXT /* Status of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_features_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
column_names: Make and model of the vehicle
Date when the vehicle was manufactured
Fuel efficiency in miles per gallon (MPG)

Summary of inspections during the ownership period
Unique identifier for each inspection record
Location where the inspection was conducted
Reference to the salesperson who made the sale
Whether a warranty was sold with the vehicle
Reference to the trade-in vehicle (if applicable)
Date of birth of the customer
Date the customer first interacted with the dealership
Preferred date for a test drive
Preferred time for a test drive
Additional notes or requests from the customer
